Now let's look at the options: (A) The owl is the second from the right. No, the owl is in position 2 from the left, so it's the fourth from the right. So A is false. (B) The hawk is the second from the right. The hawk is in position 1 from the left, so it's the fifth from the right. So B is false. (C) The robin is the second from the right. The robin is in position 3 from the left, so it's the third from the right. So C is false. (D) The crow is the second from the right. The crow is in position 5 from the left, so it's the first from the right. So D is false. (E) The raven is the second from the right.
